creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:

diff -urN astro/wmspaceweather/pkg/DESCR.orig astro/wmspaceweather/pkg/DESCR

+++ astro/wmspaceweather/pkg/DESCR      Thu Jan 20 13:51:12 2000
@@ -3,3 +3,5 @@
 
 Author:
